messages.content:
37、(单选题2分)
So just a few steps forward and you _________ safe.   
A. are
B. were
C. will be 
D. are being
C. will be

8、(单选题2分)
People _________ spend so much on clothes in the past. 
A. needn’t  
B. didn't
C. mustn’t
D. shouldn't
B. didn't

43、(单选题2分)
I didn't _________ any difference between the two pictures.
A. see 
B. look   
C. watch  
D. meet
A. see

47、(单选题2分)
_________ me, you will need it on your trip.  
A. Tell  
B. Trust
C. Ask  
D. Help
B. Trust

7.When did television become popular?  
A.Before the Second World War.
B.After the Second World War.  
C.During the Second World War.   
D.In 1935.
B. After the Second World War.

11、(单选题2分)
What is the woman going to do next?   
A. To let him change a room.  
B. To talk to David.
C. To ask David to change a room. 
D. To tell David to take the man seriously.
C. To ask David to change a room.

15、(单选题2分)
Who is the woman in the conversation?
A. A student counselor.   
B. David’s friend.
C. The man’s friend. 
D. A teaching assistant.
A. A student counselor.

How will they travel?
A. They will travel by air and by bus.
B. They will travel by air and by car.
C. They will travel by bus and by bike.
D. They will travel by air and by bike.
A. They will travel by air and by bus.

25、(单选题2分)
Jim was overjoyed because he could make good use of the chance to ______.
A.see Mary in Paris 
B.get married with Mary
C.take Mary to Paris for their honeymoon
D.tour Paris with Mary
D. tour Paris with Mary.

27、(单选题2分)
Why was the writer in the hospital?
A.Because he felt ill.
B.Because he needed a blood transfusion.
C.Because his uncle had had a heart attack. 
D.Because his uncle was going to have an operation.
C. Because his uncle had had a heart attack.

28、(单选题2分)
Which of the fowling is close to “cut a few corners” in meaning?
A. cut short
B.save money   
C. borrow money
D. earn extra money
B. save money

28、(单选题2分)
Which of the fowling is close to “cut a few corners” in meaning?
A. cut short
B.save money   
C. borrow money
D. earn extra money
B. save money
